commands.review_summary:
The PR changes QA-Lab WhatsApp live runs to skip bootstrap, collect timings/RSS/trace/heap diagnostics, forward gateway env patches, disable thinking for exact-marker canaries, and narrow WhatsApp group hydration for DM-only sessions.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection shows the PR enables heap snapshots, copies them under the uploaded output directory, and narrows hydration in a way that misses groupPolicy allowlist. The intended RTT improvement still needs live WhatsApp proof.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer draft plus security-sensitive artifact handling and a compatibility finding need author or maintainer revision before merge.

target.title: fix(qa): reduce WhatsApp live RTT setup cost
target.body:
Summary
- Skip WhatsApp live QA agent workspace bootstrap, matching the Telegram live QA fast path for ping/pong scenarios that do not need workspace files.
- Add per-scenario WhatsApp live phase timings to summary/report artifacts so RTT runs can separate gateway startup, channel readiness, send, and reply wait cost.
- Add a changelog entry and focused unit coverage.

Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/whatsapp/whatsapp-live.runtime.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

Behavior addressed: WhatsApp live QA canary runs were paying unnecessary agent workspace bootstrap cost and had no phase timing artifact for isolating remaining RTT.
Real environment tested: local Codex worktree unit proof only so far; remote Convex/Blacksmith proof will run from this draft PR head.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/whatsapp/whatsapp-live.runtime.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: 12 WhatsApp live runtime tests passed, including the new skipBootstrap and report timing checks.
Observed result after fix: summary/report artifacts can now include gatewayStart, channelReady, sendText, and waitForReply timings; config sets `agents.defaults.skipBootstrap=true` for WhatsApp live QA.
What was not tested: live WhatsApp Convex RTT and heap evidence have not passed yet on this branch.
target.author: vincentkoc
